name: advises
definition: Actor advises another civic unit or process.

name: appoints
definition: Actor appoints a civic unit, office, board member, or officer.

name: codifies
definition: Actor codifies legal or administrative material.

name: confirms
definition: Actor confirms a nomination or appointment.

name: elects
definition: Actor elects an office or body.

name: gives great weight to
definition: Actor gives great weight to ANC recommendations.

name: oversees
definition: Actor oversees or exercises oversight over another civic unit.

name: publishes
definition: Actor publishes legal or administrative material.

name: reviews
definition: Actor reviews a District law or action.
